title: Undergraduate Research Assistant
subtitle: Wireless Sensors & Devices Lab at the University of Waterloo

info.text: Developed a scalable Python-based multi-radar signal processing system for synchronized acquisition and visualization of Infineon BTG60TR13C mmWave data, integrated into a non-invasive glucose monitoring prototype; Presented at IEEE AP-S/URSI 2025 Conference

Built an multi-mmWave radar based fall detection system with Luneburg Lens for expanded coverage and accuracy; optimized power and processing. Achieved 3rd place globally in IEEE AP-S Student Design Competition

info: Refactored and optimized radar data analysis program by successfully converting a Python-based radar analysis program to C++ using TensorFlow C and xTensor, achieving at least a 50% reduction in execution time and significantly improving computational efficiency
Developed a 5G-enabled leak sensor by configuring 5G band locking with AT commands on a Nordic Thingy:91 microcontroller and reviewing C starter code for system integration

Expanded on the original Python multi-radar project by implementing UDP server on Infineon XENSIV microcontroller to wirelessly send radar data to a PC using C++ and Python, allowing for low-cost deployment of radar sensors in LTC homes

title: Full Stack Software Developer
subtitle: StackAdapt
info: Built and shipped Bulk Actions v2, a spreadsheet-based bulk editing system for campaigns, flights, and creatives (images/videos) using React (TypeScript) and Ruby with GraphQL, including an input assistant tool to copy/apply values across edits for improved efficiency
Led design and implementation of multi-goal campaigns, adding support for Min CPA, Min CPC, and Max CTR, enabling advertisers to optimize spend across platforms with greater control
Played a key role in delivering Bulk Actions v2 to 100% of users on schedule, recovering a delayed project and ensuring an on-time full rollout

title: Software Developer
subtitle: ON Semiconductors (Onsemi)
info: Designed a multistage Natural Language Processing pipeline in Python TensorFlow and diffusion-based generative models to automate test set creation via Natural Language Generation, leveraging DAG-based test structure generation and latent-space modeling to automate test creation leading to rising of development efficiency

Engineered high-performance backend Python packages to abstract automated test infrastructure, enabling dynamic test creation, execution and reporting via a unified API and CLI, allowing for modular integration of testing frameworks and Jira reporting—resulting in a >6x performance boost and improved test reliability

Conceptualized Python test frameworks to validate Bluetooth and audio stacks across FPGA/eval boards, ensuring coverage of pairing, streaming, and codec functionality via requirements and C++ code coverage

title: Software Developer
subtitle: Imagine Communications
info: Created a robust E2E automation Python framework to integrate Selenium and WinAppDriver to validate complex UI workflows in Windows-based applications, reducing test times by >50% and increasing test reliability >75%
Integrated test automation into Jenkins pipelines, modernizing the test ecosystem and doubling test visibility via improved reporting and dashboarding tools

title: Full Stack Software Developer
subtitle: Consolidated Fastfrate
info: Built a secure full-stack shipment tracking mobile web application using Angular, .NET, and MS SQL by implementing JWT-based auth, and input validation for enterprise-scale logistics
Created a backend service in C# and MS SQL database with REST API communication interfaces to enable real time notifications, authentication, and shipment and driver tracking

title: QA Developer
subtitle: Super (formerly Snapcommerce)
info: Recipient of Super's Intern Exceeds Expectations Award for exceeding performance expectations

Performed regression and manual front-end testing on multiple platforms (Windows, MacOS, iOS, Android) prior to code deploys by testing edge cases not covered by automated tests or program requirements

title: Network Support Technician
subtitle: University of Waterloo
info: Surveyed and modelled Wi-Fi coverage patterns around campus to optimize access point placement using Ekahau Pro, increasing wireless connectivity and reliability by up to 60%
